title: Chest Boat Patch
description: Right-click to open the chest boat inventory, not ride it.
body:
# Chest Boat Patch

I made this mod to fix a problem [ilmango](https://youtube.com/@ilmango) had when using chest boats as storage. In his Skyblock 1.19 series, he accidentally mounted one of the boats (in [this video](https://youtu.be/h-sr8DV4f4E?t=830)) and caused them to be misaligned. To fix this, I decided to change the interaction behaviour of chest boats. To open the chest boat inventory, you now simply press right-click on it. To ride the boat, you now (by default) press the Left Alt key and right-click (use button).

## Version Compatibility Table
| Mod version | Minecraft version | Minimum Fabric Loader Version |
|-------------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 1.0.7       | 1.21.2 - 1.21.6   | 0.16.9                        |
| 1.0.6       | 1.21 - 1.21.1     | 0.16.2                        |
| 1.0.5.1     | 1.20 - 1.20.4     | 0.14.21                       |
| 1.0.5       | 1.20              | 0.14.21                       |
| 1.0.4       | 1.19.4            | 0.14.17                       |
| 1.0.3       | 1.19.2 - 1.19.3   | 0.14.9                        |
| 1.0.2       | 1.19.2 - 1.19.3   | 0.14.9                        |
| 1.0.1       | 1.19.2            | 0.14.9                        |
| 1.0.0       | 1.19.2            | 0.14.9                        |
